creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
% /usr/local/toybox/sbin/lsmod
lsmod: No file /proc/modules: No such file or directory
% file /proc
/proc: directory
% grep procfs /etc/fstab | grep -v \#
proc                    /proc                   procfs     rw                         0     0
% uname -aKU
FreeBSD mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd 15.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT main-n273070-6d42d5dbdd67 GENERIC-NODEBUG amd64 1500025 1500025
%
